flow-definition.description: Firecracker VM matrix for lpf end-to-end networking scenarios with JUnit and Allure evidence.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: EXPECTED_COMMIT
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Short or full lpf commit expected in the source archive.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: KERNEL_MATRIX
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Comma-separated kernel labels. Lab 141 currently registers one usable Firecracker kernel image.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: SCENARIO_COUNT
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Number of lpf e2e scenarios to run per kernel label. The normal range is 400-600.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: SOURCE_ARCHIVE_BASE_URL
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Optional archive base URL. Defaults to the Firecracker guest default gateway on port 18081.
